title: bursera standleyana
intro: Bursera standleyana, also known as the Mexican copal tree, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Bursera standleyana are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to create remedies for various health conditions, such as colds, fever, and skin issues.
